data.name: Hentai Beach 2
data.detailed_description:
❤️‍🔥 Wishlist Campaign! ❤️‍🔥


關於此遊戲

Immerse yourself in an exciting journey to the sunny beach, where beautiful girls are waiting for you, ready for any adventure! Don't miss the chance to feel like a real hero of erotic fantasy in this exciting clicker game! Spank girls and give them pleasure with every touch... They want more and more!

Features:

  • A classic clicker game with endless gameplay...

  • Lots of beautiful girls in swimsuits won't let you get bored!

  • Slap girls on the butt to win their love and earn hearts

  • Totally destructible swimsuits! Take them off soon to have more fun!

  • Lots of colorful backgrounds of sunny beaches giving a heavenly pleasure

  • Increase your level with each click and upgrade your abilities!

  • Spend your earned hearts to summon cute animals to your aid

  • HANDS-FREE MODE!!! (Free your hands to fully enjoy the game)

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2.6 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1GB 3D DirectX 9 Compatible video card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: 3.1 Ghz Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2GB 3D DirectX 9 Compatible video card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
